headline: Man's LinkedIn 'Thought Leader' Posts Are Just Quotes From His Mom, Nobody Notices
summary: 'Hard work pays off,' Mom said. 'Thanks Mom,' Jake posted. 47,000 likes. 'Mom is proud,' Mom said.
fullBody: Jake ThoughtLeader posts daily 'wisdom' on LinkedIn. The source: his mom. 'You miss 100% of the shots you don't take,' Jake posted. His mom said that. 'Innovation requires risk,' Jake posted. Also Mom. Jake has 47,000 followers. 'He's so insightful,' one commented. Jake's mom now has her own LinkedIn. 'I raised him,' Mom's bio reads. She has 2 followers. 'It's fine,' Mom said. 'I'm proud.'
